instructions: Instructions for Weekly Test PCM 01
JEE Preparation: Benchmark (mixed difficulty)
Login : Enter your NAME IN CAPITAL LETTERS and Enrollment ID exactly as given by the Academy for this program.
2. Timer : Once you login, the test timer will appear on screen.
3. Changing Answers: You can change any option before final submit. To remove your selected option, click 'Clear' and choose again.
Total Duration: 90 minutes
Each correct answer: +4
Each wrong answer: -1
No negative marks for unattempted questions
Each subject (Physics – 15, Chemistry – 15, Mathematics – 15) contains 30 Multiple Choice Question questions (10 in each subject), contains 15 NAT (5 in each subject)
+5 (for each subject) if answered only correct answer in total 15 marks.
+5 if no single wrong answer in the entire question paper.
Total = 20 marks for smart players.
Do not refresh the page during the exam
Clcik the Submit Button End of The Exam is Over
